metadata.name: Candidate Pipeline — Parse Error Alert
metadata.description: Companion Zap that fires when the Claude AI parsing step fails and the main pipeline sets Status to 'Needs Manual Review'. Queries Airtable for records in this state and sends a Slack alert to the recruitment ops channel so the record can be reviewed and corrected manually.
metadata.trigger: Scheduled (every 1 hour) — polls Airtable for new 'Needs Manual Review' records

steps.label: New Airtable Record — Status = Needs Manual Review

config.note: Create a filtered view in Airtable named 'Needs Manual Review' that shows records where Status = 'Needs Manual Review' AND the record was created in the last 24h. Zapier polls this view every 5–15 minutes.

output_variables.parse_error_note: AI Summary (will contain error context or be empty)

steps.label: Send Slack Alert to Recruitment Ops
Update Airtable — Set Alert Sent Flag

config.note: Prevents the alert firing again on the next poll. Add an 'Ops Alerted' checkbox field to the Candidates table and filter the view by Ops Alerted = false.
